```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: Tune Azure Cosmos DB partitioning and RU usage for workload fit.
---
Task:
Improve Cosmos throughput and cost efficiency.
Requirements:
Review partition key, RU settings, and query patterns.
Constraints:
Prefer point reads; avoid accidental cross-partition scans.
Success Criteria:
Lower RU waste and better latency stability.
```
